title: Security
subtitle: Manage your account security settings
newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
passwordsDoNotMatch: New password and confirmation do not match
saveSecurityFailed: An error occurred while saving security settings
changePasswordDesc: Update your current password with a new strong one.
twoFactorAuthDesc: Enable two-factor authentication to enhance your account security.
twoFactorEnabledDesc: Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account
twoFactorDisabledDesc: Enable two-factor authentication to enhance security
scanQrStep: 1. Scan the QR code using your preferred authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
enterCodeStep: 2. Enter the 6-digit verification code from the app.
recentActivityDesc: Review recent security events on your account.
loginFromChrome: Successfully logged in from Chrome browser on Windows
